programs.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programs.desc: The CSIs investigate the killing of a man afflicted with Hypertrichosis, a.k.a. human werewolf syndrome.

programs.title: CSI: Miami
programs.desc: Three gunrunners are killed by a new high-tech weapon called The Vaporiser. After Horatio interviews the CEO of the defence contractor that made the weapon, he also turns up dead.

programs.title: CSI: New York
programs.desc: A group of violent kidnappers capture Robert Dunbrook's son just before he is scheduled to testify against his father to a grand jury, and the CSI team is rocked by a tragedy.

programs.title: Bones
programs.desc: An ad man's body is found in community centre playground. The victim had burned his bridges by adopting an aggressive attitude and was a member of a radical honesty supporting group.

programs.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programs.desc: When an anti-capitalist protestor is murdered, Jane and the team investigate and find themselves caught in a war between eco-activists and a tech billionaire fighting over a piece of land. Also, Jane and Captain Joe (Enver Gjokaj) go on a date.

programs.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programs.desc: The NCIS team investigates a cold case involving WWII-era bones on the 80th anniversary of the Pearl Harbour bombings, and are shocked to learn they belong to a 100-year-old survivor of the attack.
